hypothesis: If the physics-constrained diffusion model (PCDiff) enforces non-negativity and sum-to-one constraints on material component proportions during diffusion, then it will generate compositions that satisfy physical feasibility (non-negativity and unit-sum) and practical fabrication limits at higher rates than CVAE and TabDDPM, demonstrating superior Validityreg and Validityfab without compromising fidelity and diversity.
